description: Two separate OS processes should successfully exchange Mycel wire-protocol messages via stdin/stdout pipe transport.

assertions.description: Separate OS processes successfully exchanged objects via pipe transport.
The sync stream stdout was correctly consumed by sync pull stdin across process boundaries.
Reader replay result matches the seed state after multi-process sync.
Reader accepted head revisions match the seed state after multi-process sync.

notes: This test proves the wire protocol works between separate OS processes.
Transport is a stdin/stdout pipe: mycel sync stream | mycel sync pull --transcript -
Closes the last Deferred item in the M4 simulator test matrix.
